slides.title: Stop fighting your *body clock*.
slides.sub: Your chronotype is your genetic timing for sleep, energy and focus. Working with it can ease the strain on your heart and metabolism.

slides.title: You have a built-in clock
slides.body: Your chronotype sets when you naturally feel alert or sleepy. It is *largely written in your genes*, not a matter of willpower.

slides.title: Misalignment adds strain
slides.body: Living against your clock is called circadian misalignment. It *is linked to* higher cardiometabolic risk over time.

slides.title: Time your hardest work
slides.body: Schedule demanding tasks for your natural peak hours. Aligning effort with energy *can support* sharper focus and less fatigue.

slides.title: Move when you fire up
slides.body: Exercise when your body feels primed, not when you are forcing it. Well-timed movement *may help* sleep and recovery.

slides.title: Anchor your meals
slides.body: Eating earlier and on a steady schedule *can support* metabolic health. Late, erratic meals push against your clock.

slides.title: Learn *your* rhythm.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your sleep, food, movement and steps, then turns the patterns into one daily Health Score so you can see when your body works best.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Some of us wake up sharp at sunrise. Others hit their stride at night. Neither is wrong. 🌿

Working with your chronotype instead of against it, timing your focus, movement and meals to your natural clock, can ease the strain on your heart and metabolism. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those daily patterns into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Stop Fighting Your Body Clock: Work With Your Chronotype
